full_text:
Luo Xian (Lingze) 羅憲 (令則)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Luo Xian (羅憲), styledLingze (令則), was born in Nan. Luo Meng’s son. Served in Shu under Liu Shan. Did not support Huang Hao. Luo Xian was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom, the Wei Kingdom, and the Jin Dynasty. Luo Xian lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
